title: Old version
description: Remember the past, nostalgia, old age...
body:
A build that will make you nostalgic for the days when the beta and alpha versions of Minecraft were released. Plunge into the atmosphere of those years with your head!

I strongly recommend using the old textures and built-in Genesis shaders, which will give your world a unique charm. 

Then you think about the old versions of minecraft, probably the first feeling that these memories cause you is nostalgia. Nostalgia for those times then you built your first house, then for the first time played with a friend in the same world. You may still have a dog waiting for you from your first world. But if you've ever wanted to experience these emotions again, welcome to the Old version!
![old.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/498b458c8af18badf08dd85b141c5604b7cb84a4.png)
